---
# The title MUST start with "FIMS Weekly - "
title: "FIMS Weekly - April 13–17, 2026"
date: "April 13, 2026"
# Change the following categories accordingly, but you MUST keep fims-weekly
categories:
  - fims-weekly
three-big-things:
  bt1: "Send presentations for CIE Review to OST for review."
  bt2: "Make a check-list of final tasks for the Surplus Production model (carry over from last week)."
  bt3: "Reactivate the FIMS planning repository."
# Announcements go below because of formatting that quarto doesnt transfer over from the yml
# If there is no code club or seaside chat, just delete those lines and the template will handle it for you
upcoming-events:
# If you have any additional events, uncomment and fill out the additional events section below.
# If there is no actual photo you can delete include-photo, path, and alt-text 
# and the template will handle it for you. 
# If there is code instead, please uncomment the section below named photo-code 
# but still include the text portion under photo.
photo:
  text: "GitHub released a feature last week allowing users to [sort their notifications](https://github.blog/changelog/2026-04-09-new-sort-by-control-added-to-notifications/) on the web interface. You can look at all of your notifications by navigating to www.github.com/notifications; this interface is great for being able to turn off notifications for specific threads that you are not interested in or honing in on recent notifications from a certain repository."
  include-photo: true
  path: "https://github.blog/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/SortBy_Improvements_Header_v02.jpg?w=1536"
  alt-text: "A screenshot of GitHub showing where to sort your notifications."
---
  
{{< include "fims-weekly-template.qmd" >}}

::: {#announcements}
- 7 days until the CIE Review.
- There are still empty time slots for taking notes during the CIE Review, please sign up in this [Google Doc](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1MfqLOMrkawPrQzdI3ycybxBx2gk8r7tLa44iKIo0taY/edit?tab=t.0).
::: 
    

<!-- ::: {#photo-code}
::: -->
